---
name: "Buddy — Travel companion"
about: "You're going to a DiscoverEU city and want to share a meal or museum visit with another traveler"
title: "[Traveler] {your-handle} in {city} {dates}"
labels: ["buddy-matching", "buddy-traveler"]
---

### Safety first
- [ ] I will meet in a **public place**.
- [ ] I understand no payment/ID/personal docs are ever shared.
- [ ] I've read the [safety guidance](https://github.com/embeddedJedi/discovereu-companion#buddy-safety).

### You
**GitHub handle:** @your-handle-here
**City:** (e.g. Paris)
**Your dates:** (e.g. 2026-06-12 → 2026-06-15)
**What you'd like to do together:** (meal, museum, walk, concert)
**Languages:** (e.g. EN, FR, TR)

### Anything else?
(Optional — travel style, budget, neurodiverse-friendly pace, etc.)
